text: The storm is sweet embrace to those who dance in the rain, a sacrament of wilderness and liberation for those born to our sacred ancestral path. In fearless surrender, they are unmade and reborn, becoming kin to its tempest, lovers to its fury, and heirs to its grace. ☥

Let not the faltering of the lost veil your vision or hinder your resolve as torchbearers of the Ancients. Walk the path lit in shadows, your footsteps a song to the Nameless Ones, giants beyond culture, epoch and land. They remain your compass before the clamor of the world. ☥

Approach in humility and their breath becomes logos: a word of frozen jade and flaming yew, the numinous force that forges through silence rather than consumes. In falsehood there is no word, only fire — the merciless honesty that burns away all that should never have been. ᛉ

A Dragon speaks only in the presence of truth, by the naked recognition of one's own insignificance. Stand unclothed of name, title and illusion for Dragons do not parley with appearances.

When ego kneels, they listen.
When masks fall, they look.
Through raw devotion, they stir.

To wield the sword is to cradle a curse veiled in duty, not chosen but whispered by fate. In a world that forgot the covenant of honor, the warrior becomes a ghost clad in defiance. The craven seek mercy they have not sown, with our silence the blade’s edge in every nightmare. ☥

Those who fail to grasp the sanctity of selfless unity are undone not by others but slowly devoured by shadows of their own making; a quiet corruption that blossoms within. Self-inflicted pain rooted in absence and sorrow, nourished by illusions of comfort's deceitful hand. ☥

Our gnosis is mightiest weapon, puissant salve and feared liberation, cutting through illusion, shielding the just and soothing the soul unshackled. It is key for the rare souls who dare to break the golden cage, a silent current alive and in motion, unseen yet reshaping all. ☥

The oneiric chant of primordial light is but a fine shadow of the endarkened soul, once baptized by the ancestral veils of otherness and clothed in the atramentous fabric of the unmanifest horizon bridging cosmos and abyss — stellar fire and chthonic ice as our tenebrous path. ☥

Many traditions drink from the faded echoes of the Primordial Dragon, yet only a rare few can traverse the arcane pathways that lead into the realms of otherness and their sentient powers, and rarer still are those that can awaken authentic spiritual and sorcerous communion. ᛉ

In an uncultured world where illusory shadows cavort upon the walls of mortal unknowing, even meager vermin aspire to walk as dragons. Their essence but a fleeting spark of corrupted light, lost and unheeded before the serene detachment of beings they vainly strive to emulate. ☥

Ages may pass, yet a soul must return Home — bearing shattered echoes of countless falls, each shard an unfolded map, tears that carve the way upon spirit and flesh, a silent sorrow born of a thousand battles, scars as a talisman and compass of symbols only your eyes can read. ☥

There will always be turbulent waters and devastating storms in the meadows of life, yet the learned initiate cultivates acceptance and stillness, yielding in flowing surrender, so that the maelstrom may pass through them. The warrior does not fear the storm — they become it. ☥

We walk among giants, treading the gnarled roots of the most ancient trees, our voices woven into the songs of the wind, our footsteps stirring the tremors of the earth. Our hands rise to the drums of time, as colossal mountains bearing the smoldering hearts of rock and flame. ☥

The sacred mysteries of Asetianism form the essential foundation for surviving the alchemical crossing into the realms of the Primordial Dragon—the whetstone that sharpens the Sword of the Soul, allowing it to bathe in abyssal fire without bursting into the flames of oblivion. ☥

In a decaying world of selfishness and deceit, a mundane reality of idolized liars, proud oppressors and tainted prophets, to endure and rise through authenticity, compassion, loyalty and honor becomes a daring mark of feared rebellion — a sinister song of revolution. ☥

Heiðr speaks through the gentle dance of a flame, by the howling winds of an untamed storm, in the silence of a wild thriving forest, beneath the blackness of the hidden moon, within the deadliness of the most vicious of poisons… a forbidden language only the devout can hear. ᛉ

So many eras have come and gone, unfathomable tribulations clashed and done, yet the Family remains ever stronger, under the guiding roar of ancient Dragons and their blackened wings of cosmic silk. Remain strong, bold and genuine beneath the falling leaves of rot and falsity. ☥

Mysteries are revealed through the weathered hands of the faithful.
A crude carving that conceals the highest of truths.
The stone ever unblemished by time.
☥

Those who understand the voices of nature and speak its elemental language do not get swayed by corrupted paths and false prophets, distilled through vulnerable ego with delusions of mortal minds — decaying trees without strong roots bearing the rotten fruit of no living seed. ☥

In absolute darkness where the meager do not dare to tread we walk the forbidden path of Her crown, sacrificing bone and flesh to Her cursed bosom and offering the blood of dragons to Her abominating lips, devotedly bestowed upon the hallowed altar mirrored in the endless sky. ☥

To study this magnum Path of all paths one must diligently break all limitations of race, civilization, narrative and epoch, mindfully seeking and revealing the elusive vital threads that connect this grand tapestry that timelessly ignites the ultimate machinery of the cosmos. ☥

Asetianism, as the Art of all arts, emerges to the initiated sage as the Philosophy of all philosophies and unveils itself to the erudite historian as the Culture of all cultures. It is equally Science and Magic, unrestrained of societal conditioning and the chains of time. ☥

The greatest manifestation of ignorance resides not in a lack of knowing, as for that anyone humble can be excused, but in the weaker minds that stubbornly refuse to learn when given the chance or that from a place of distorted ego are utterly unable to. ☥

Empress of Spirit. Ruler of Magic.
The Lady of Wood and Stone.
Your eyes mirror the starlight of the cosmos.
Your voice an unfathomable hymn of the abyss.
All bow before You, ardently or unwittingly.
Deadly heart of Yew. Immortal soul of Jade.
Your enemies crumble in terror...
ᛉ

Do not feed maggots and vermin, as degenerately as they live, for those are a common pest of no consequence to our magic. Simply prune their pestilence and influence, fiercely and detachedly, so that corruption is not given the soil it desperately seeks in order to spread. ☥

Upon entering the great halls of everlasting silence one must stare into the piercing void behind the gargantuan mirror of eternity. Will you welcome your pure reflection staring back at you or cower in fear before an unrecognizable echo of a twisted refraction? ☥

As our torches illuminate the numinous path of One in the Zero so the triadic mystery of Three in the Nine is revealed under the winged shadow of Seven in the Three. Violet and Red transmuted into the Sword of Flames with the cypher of the Dragon carved in its blade as 379. ᛉ

The flames of the Dragon burn deeper than heated life and the untouchable cold of death, intricately weaved along the unseen threads of all realities above and below, pouring as sacred nectar into the endless blood of immortality. Tread carefully. Love passionately. Rise anew. ☥

Life is made of pain.
Death is made of silence. 
Rebirth is made of immortality. 
☥

The silent paws of Anubis… forever guiding the footsteps of our legacy between worlds stellar and chthonic with the unsung songs of timeless death. In darkness and shadow. In honor and duty. Ever watchful and unseen. ☥

There is an arcane mystery to our draconian formulae of three times three that, by the primordial poison in the flames of ice and fire, can break cosmic duality into the transcendental fabric of the lawless abyss beyond its rule; a hidden code of magic, a secret key of gnosis. ᛉ

We live in an era of artificial empathy, when people celebrate a world of causes and ideologies that are often distant and fashionable without an emotional investment and distilled action, neglecting that which can ignite real change, nurture growth and fuel genuine unity. ☥

Lady of Yew, Mystery of Mysteries
Eternal Empress of Forbidden Flame
Scarlet Crown of Thorns and Roses
Lustful Body of Sensual Mandragora
Poisonous Blood of Daring Nightshade
Thunderous Voice of Unbroken Oak
Arcane Language of Devoted Birch
ᛉ

The Word is your Wand; a magical implement capable of weaving the delicate threads between sacred and profane, the sharp blade that melds intellect and art into the subtle alloy of talismanic science in our infamous alchemy of silence. ☥

Embrace all storms in their ferocious wilderness, as raptured whispers of the Great Dragons piercing through untamed otherness. Honor this primal language of blessing and cursing — creation and destruction. ᛉ

Seven veils of winged mask divine
Three as key in the empyrean dark
Nine the ardent token of unmaking
Mark of the Dragon in halls arcane
ᛉ

Devourer of kings and augur of torment
Adamantine whip of ravenous flames
Severing edge to the sibylline threads
Pouring the sanctified bleeding of queens
Dyadic mystery of primordial arcanum
From heaven to hell no crown is mightiest
The thunderous Horns of the Great Dragon
ᛉ

The Great Dragon is everywhere and nowhere, permeating the entire fabric of what is real and surreal — existence and non-existence, being and non-being — a cryptic paradox unlocked only by the mysteries of limitless absence, perpetually within the shadow of absolute otherness. ᛉ
Hubris is the poisonous downfall of fools. A soaring defeat of the many and the ordinary, when self becomes the greatest enemy of true identity. ☥

Hail the Primordial Dragon! The monstrous inferno of intangible greatness that precedes every reality and creation, transcending comprehension and breaking all chains of possibility. Emergence of the primeval sorcerous manifestation… the abyssal wellspring of all magic. ᛉ
The greatest strength of a warrior is patience; the greatest weakness is ignorance. ☥

Her roar is heard on dominating thunder.
Her songs are all the words unspoken.
Her blessing comes in ineffable wings.
To drink Her nectar is most forbidden.
Ecstatic frenzy of Her numinous beauty.
Arcane swords we rise in Her name.
Eternally... We rise and fall to Her game.
☥

When the flame gleams brighter as stars rise and burn, for the Wise the cosmos hints towards a moment of caution and measured celebration. Look towards the greatness that was conquered by honorable hand and the blessings that deserve to be treasured with grace and gratitude. ☥

Knowledge is a potent tool and a powerful weapon, however when hoarded without purpose or driven by a desire for vain status, the allure of rank and appearance, not methodically honed in genuine praxis and dedication to the Art, it never truly manifests into valuable Wisdom. ☥

The cosmic trials of silence are both a blessing and a curse, casting fire upon doubt and burning all that is unnecessary while freezing in timeless ice that which is unapologetically vital, simple and fundamental, as ancient alchemy preserving their purity. ☥

The Dark Moon opens a gateway to the sacred Cave, a crossing of spirit for the most daring of souls. One that can only be attained through absolute honesty and loyalty by surrendering in darkness. Her menacing trials await those wielding the sword. A first step into Flame. ᛉ

The monstrous darkness of such violent chthonic emergence can never be reflected by a mere effluence of aesthetic pleasure but only integrated through the oneiric root call to the most profound marrow of the daemonic Soul. ᛉ

The Arcana of Ice and Fire is now released in a limited First Edition of 333 copies and distributed to select Orders and Covens. Further details on this edition and its Certificate of Authenticity can be found at the official site under the tab Arcana.
https://www.primordialdragon.com/

The path of flames is not for the faint of heart. It is a road to be treaded by those that do not conform to society and reject following the herd; the ones that dare to cast their hearts into the fire, carving their own journey through pain and sorrow but never surrendering. ☥

Honoring what is sacred remains a vital ingredient of living grace, notably in a time when most are chained to the blindness of that which is profane through the sacrifice of honor and enslavement of spirit. The via celestial in defiance to the dormant decay of the mundane. ☥

Make place in your garden for the seeds that the winds carry. Enliven the current on the inner fabric of your soul. Find devotion in the boundless gift that is bestowed. As we descend into darkness so we ascend into light. Do not fear a heart surrendered to honesty. We begin. ☥

Through the trials of Ice and Fire the way of the Dragon is revealed and primordial sorcery unleashed; a spell shattering the corrupted establishment long in decay, trembling to the roar of giants. ᛉ

Hail the forbidden Triad of all abominations!
Hail the Primordial Dragon!

Ancient abominations emerge from the gargantuan abyss; a hymn of terror weaved into the fabric of awakened nightmares. The descent begins, reckoning to devour the unworthy…

Primordial Dragon — A Sorcerous Tradition of Ice and Fire

http://www.primordialdragon.com

☥  ᛉ

Their nature is the fabric of nightmares imprinted within the soul of the living and the memory of the dead, an echoing memento of a truth no one longer dares to recognize; their names adversarial chaos burned deep into the flesh as agonizing wounds of lifetimes. ☥

Unspoken voices of a nameless idiom uttering ineffable words through the thrice-rising mystery of cold and flame, a truth silently locked within the most terrible veils of the abyss that emerge from the gaping void of raw untamed nothingness.

We pierce through the abominable veils of relentless shadow; Dragons soaring across the ethereal fabric of numinous existence as the unfathomable arcanum of menacing tempest, carrying the venerable Flames of primordial Ice and Fire through the obscure cosmos of the underworld. ☥
There are mysteries that can only be revealed by starlight. ☥

In shadow as in light. In darkness as in flame.
Our shrouded banners of path, soul and fate bleed only through tenacity, authenticity and merit; a triple cadence to the hidden realities undisturbed by time and cloaked by voracious locks of storm.
The unseen sorcery of Legions. ☥

Seek out the source. Never be afraid of returning to the truest cradle of mysteries; the root of tradition, a genesis of spirit, markedly removed from the ceaseless pollution of our world and those that would taint the most genuine of songs. Surrender to the winged embrace. ☥

In our perpetual silence we embrace the darkness of night and dance with the ancestral shades of the dead as friends, lovers and allies. In honor of our limitless blessings seen in the breathtaking beauty of life and its untold cycles of renewal; Devotion that remains as One. ☥
May Aset be thrice honored and Her ineffable Daemons endarken you. ☥

The arcane mysteries of Seven flow forth from the divine womb of the cosmos; the sacred nectar of immortality that pours silently into the rarest of seeds. Ah blessed rapture of Her ineffable domain, the inscrutable void of She —feral, primal and ferocious. Seeing it is Death. ☥

Our blood flows to the seductive dances of the unseen, casting light and darkness upon the ecstatic shadows of time eternal. A fire burning wildly to the tune of most ancient mysteries. Our eyes the echo of an unbreakable promise, our voices the songs of all that is forbidden. ☥

Life is a labyrinthine tapestry of twists and turns; humble dirt roads of unknown villages and the gargantuan avenues of a major metropolis. All valuable in their own terms and virtue, each with a vital lesson of its own. Pursue them daringly with integrity and a brave soul. ☥
A thorn in the dark, a spell unto the flame. Impregnable fortress of our menacing domain. Serpentine dragons of old, rise ever wild and untamed. ☥

Scorching fires on a burning storm of ancient ice. Dreaded forces seemingly unmoving in the darkness of night. Cries of your ancestors echoing from afar. A screeching owl and a cunning fox. Unyielding powers of our long forgotten tribe. ☥
May your inner compass become one of a deeply rooted subtle foundation, untainted by the constricting chains of mundanity and the crawling worms of a vainglorious society deprived of meaning. ☥

A call of profound intimate renewal awaits the daring and bold; eternal transformation in a perpetual dance of impermanence, unlocked only by keys of patience and perseverance. Attachment to crude unmoving stone a stagnation to crumble through our poisonous initiatory waters. ☥

As the wheel turns once more to the arcane signs of the Ancients, echoes of its cyclical nature are reflected upon the ethereal alchemy that has no beginning just as it knows no end. Two illusory masks of perpetual rebirth under the timeless tune of an undying Violet Shadow. ☥

The Key is Triple. An initiatory secret of Three, bowing to the commanding voice of Dragon, Serpent and Shadow. A shapeless marrow of a nameless adage. Tenebrous depths of unspeakable void. Forgotten lessons of old. Rise, madness of the wise! ☥

Our sorcerous dance casts a monstrous shadow upon the night eternal. Fear and doom we call forth from the atramentous corridors of the underworld, our words anathema to the false light of deception. United yet alone we dine on the halls of death as the emptiness of pure being. ☥

The northern winds arise carrying the lost whispers of darkness as night takes shape into the unfathomable beasts of old. The gargantuan abyss gazes back in endless waves to the beating drums of time. We go forth as storm, death and decay, unleashing mysteries that defy all. ☥

An occultist hones the craft like an artisan of the mind, a traveller between realms. The true wayfarer of the old ways understands that mastery is not an end but the very journey to be walked. We are the pilgrims of ancient mysteries crossing boundaries of culture and time. ☥

First there was the Word and She was Supreme. 
Then there was the Triad and it became Family.
Lastly flourished the Flame and it rose as Legacy.
☥

The ubiquitous light of consciousness looms from the cosmic horizon of time permeating the encompassing texture of existence; forebear of perception beyond incarnation emerging from the seas of nothingness where all-dissolving darkness rises as the monstrous spirit. ☥

We are both angels and demons; selflessly nourishing and empowering the loyal and genuine, while manifesting as the fabric of nightmares to the rotten that dread our sweet embrace. We proudly thrive as few and boldly trump the many. ☥

Our violet energy is the liberating tincture of transformation and spirituality to the hidden mystics of the ages but also the vile poison of death and decay to the corrupted veils of dishonesty and stagnation.

A song echoing through silence.
A hymn proudly unspoken.
Mysteries thriving in secrecy.
Veil of conspired understanding.
Gnosis by pleasure and sorrow.
Feared. Vilified. Condemned.
United. Unbroken. Soaring.
Love. Loyalty. Family.
Violet mist, a red horizon, an immortal flag…
☥

We are warriors of Life and scholars of Death. Our swords menacingly ablaze yet striking subtly upon the battlefield of eternity. Our steps a secret roadmap to the gardens of immortality, glowing dimly under the gloom of moonlight. ☥

Two and Seven; duality and sacredness. Keys to the cosmos and mysteries of reality, subtle yet manifested on the shining mask of the Full Moon, hidden behind the higher shroud of everlasting Three, the unfolding truth of immortality. ☥

The silent paws of Anubis guide the soul into the absence of light. Guardian in the shadows, roadmap of death, vision of the Underworld; standing at the crossroads of time holding the keys to Her realm. ☥

We safeguard the mysteries through the tunnels of time and cosmic memory — initiating the worthy, nurturing the wise, ignoring the spoiled and poisoning the rotten. As the wheel rotates reignite your hidden flame, be blessed with the Wings of Aset and fly with us once again. ☥

Rising from the restless waters of the fatal lake in the underworld; primal, ferocious and untamed. Roaring thunder and devastating storm, carrying the agonizing winds of initiation. Child of the dragon’s flame, blood of serpents in echoes forgotten… Your nature still arcane. ☥

Behind the mirror and cloaked in darkness we dance with the dead through the long silvery night to the sound of a lost ballad rising from an ensemble of abyssal tears. Her chalice untouched; Womb of terror and Word unspoken, the forbidden poison overflowing into a river unseen.☥

Lady of Fire. 
Queen of Poison. 
Empress of Death.
Your fiery Passion carries the Seeds of Initiation.
May Your wicked Serpent coil around my Soul. ☥

Lady of Magick. 
Queen of Torment. 
Empress of Darkness.
Your Call is the Blood of Abomination. 
May Your Fire open the Secret Gates of the Moon. ☥

The cunning fox hunts in solitude, embracing the chthonic forces of silence and quietude but able to strike from behind the veil apparently unseen with remarkable precision; a fiery spirit of the aether roaming between worlds and guardian at the gates. ☥
The Shadow Moon unveils the gates of stellar fire and black flame; Initiatrix beyond the abyss, Your three veils unfold the mysteries and cast the darkest light upon this night. ☥
Curiosity is the fiery fuel of discovery. Wield it willingly. Tame it cautiously. Explore it fiercely. ☥

Honor and loyalty demand no restraint or compromise. They are unyielding. Such forces are a hallmark of Asetian nature, a quality carved in ancient stone and stained with blood on our blades, a power that does not break nor bend as it flourishes through absolute freedom. ☥

True accomplishment is not established through the vain conceptualizations of a rotten society unaware of its decay, nor is it chained to the superficial values of those desperately clinging to their own insignificance. ☥
Surrender is the unspoken language of inner liberation, an ancient art of storm and perfume ignited through the sacrificial flame of our inner dragon upon the trine altar of realized truth. ☥
The effortless flight of a winged serpent is more meaningful and menacing than the unified strength of a horde. ☥

In a world so obsessed with outside validation we initiate through a path that only finds its apotheosis deeply within, uprooted of chains, limitations and deception; where only raw Self remains. Inside us hides a realm more vast and empowering than anything that can be seen. ☥

Sound does not exist in a vacuum. The voices of insignificance, no matter how loud, crumble and die before our unrelenting silence — lost in a void of nothingness, by the side of decaying minds and a forgotten existence. ☥
It is in times of adversity and strife that we find our unwavering strength, a reminder that we stand together, united against enemies seen and unseen. Now and always... ☥
The gentle wings of Aset in caring embrace can only be seen without sight, felt without touch, found when not sought, if perception transcends time in a state of absolute surrender. ☥

Rise above the loudness and superficiality of a mundane society lost without identity and established sense of self, where vain exhibition manifests as a rotting banner of slavery from confused minds desperate for validation. True achievement unfolds beyond such mediocrity. ☥
In life such as in war you must unify offense and defense as one, a balancing act of transcendence and impermanence, so that mastery may be unveiled as the sacred jewel hidden within emptiness. ☥

At the dawn of thought become the dragon that is capable of stillness in movement, wielding the forces of chaos and breathing silence as the everlasting flame of Aset. Bathe in the alchemical fires that burn ignorance and nurture wisdom, welcoming the cry of a newborn phoenix. ☥
Nature welcomes us in a cold embrace, as cycles shift and the wheel rotates. United in this unsung harmony we write history and renew our fate. ☥
Rekindled throughout eternity the Flame that burns in violet reveals unscathed truth while destroying the chains of deceit. ☥

The souls of the Dragon are cloaked through legend, mystery and initiation. Silent and inconspicuous to the eyes of the mundane as decaying artifacts of nature, yet roaring with indomitable Fire to those blessed with the eyes to See. ☥

In spiritual communion with our ancestors and departed Family, wise guardians and a beacon of guidance from the Duat, We rise once again in this cycle of growth with the unyielding forces of honor, love and loyalty. ☥
Those who dare look into the flaming eyes of Aset can never be blind again. ☥

Legitimate mythology must be spiritually authentic and not fabricated, lived and experienced instead of forged and defaced. Only then it can be truly empowering instead of an artifice in servitude of the ego. ☥
Mythology is immeasurably more powerful than a story, it contains the seeds of initiation for those who walk its ancient path. It conceals truth about the past and a beacon towards the future. ☥

The skill is elegant, balanced and observant. Never surrendering. A mastered Asetianist becomes a warrior of mind and spirit. A sword of fate cutting through the mysteries of life and death with a violet blade. ☥

To be an Asetianist is to be the scholar of a thousand paths, exploring wisdom in every form and without limitation. It is to wield knowledge not as a trophy to showcase but as a yearning that is never forgotten, an undying thirst that is all-consuming. ☥

Full Moon — The journey is never-ending and the pathway sewn on delicate silk with lively motifs of storm and strife, a grand tapestry shrouded in darkness and violet mist; a cosmic dance of indescribable beauty. ☥
能ある鷹は爪を隠す “The skillful Hawk hides its claws.” — Japanese proverb. ☥

There is a sacred longing that permeates the fabric of your soul with the unique vibration of everlasting Love. Elusive as the Flame that cannot be seen, an invincible force of immortal creation but also the pinnacle of immeasurable destruction. ☥

7.7 — Our blood became Her song, a lingering flag of Her domain. Within us lies the undying seed, Her broken temple renewed anew. An ouroboros in endless return, our beating heart that shall never stop. ☥

A word so frequently misused and abused in the life of the mundane, Loyalty is a paramount quality of Asetian reality. Passionately desired by many yet timeless and unbreakable in essence, it manifests without effort or obligation, as natural as breathing. ☥
Dreaded as monsters yet forgotten as nightmares. ☥

More than an arcane order of mysteries the Aset Ka represents a timeless legacy; something that cannot be described by the boundaries of language. Asetian culture embodies more than a spiritual tradition or a magickal system of initiation—it is the purest expression of Family. ☥
People dream of dragon fire and sing for its power but only before seeing it enkindled upon their shadow; then they all scream the same. ☥

Spirituality must be a force of balance and discovery. Focus on the nature of your path and do not lose sight of this inner compass, allowing for the soul to soar above the constant noise of a mundane world that will test and tempt you with emptiness disguised as truth. ☥

There is no true strength in the display of force but in the enduring nature of inner resilience against all odds. Your scars are valuable pages written with tales of your battles, treasure them as medals of honor and celebrate them without fear. ☥

In a day of balance embrace the completeness of our duality—fierce yet gentle, determined but fair and destruction capable of healing. Observe the immense beauty that surrounds us and bask in its heightened energies with gratitude for the abundance of nature and its mysteries. ☥

One journey ends and another begins. Do not worry about defeat or to concede a battle if it leads to a more important victory, as a fall is sometimes the greatest of ladders. Align your convictions with truth and sing them with confidence, never in shame yet always in loyalty. ☥

Unbound from the shackles of criticism and morality we thrive as an unrelenting  force of liberation, shaking every foundation that does not yield to higher consciousness. As forebears of gnosis our trust echoes strongly and our bonds live forever. ☥

In Asetianism one begins with roots, developing a strong foundation that allows for the growth of mesmerizing flowers and luscious fruit, a long and arduous process of dedication and discovery. Only strong roots can provide the balance that makes this path unbreakable. ☥

Do not mistake our secrecy and innate strength for hubris or arrogance as we remain detachedly untouched by outside judgement, like the drops of cold winter rain gently touching the faces of screaming men. ☥
Our hymn stays the same; a flag that never ceases to sway, a silent tune that shall never fade. ☥

Forever changing to the evolving tides of falling empires We here remain, gazing into the silver eyes of death and the impermanence of life, timelessly sculpted by the winds of history, nearly unseen by a world oblivious to its decay.
The untamable strength of our inscrutable silence is reflected on the eyes of fear from those who perceive it as a threat. ☥

The secrets behind the dominion of these ancient arts are foremost internal and only with such understanding and expertise can they echo externally in the alignment of mind and body — a subtle symmetry that is hallmark of Asetian philosophy and practice. ☥

Through our training of the martial arts one develops the skill to respond with lethal force, however that should not be the focus of learning. Its true mastery manifests through inner balance, focus and awareness; effortless control and redirection of energy outside and within.

As indomitable forces of nature — raw, primordial and fluid — we remain unpretentiously detached from the shallow waters bathing modern society with a coating of superficiality, ever unable to comprehend even the smallest specks of sand that can mirror our existence. ☥

Full Moon — Share precious gems with those capable of seeing their reflections and unveil secrets to those with the insight to understand them, for the mundane may well mistake your diamonds for useless rocks and interpret the higher mysteries as a dangerous threat. ☥

7.7 Hers is the light of all lights and darkest of all darkness; the cradle of immortality and womb of everlastingness. In communion with Her sacred blood — forbidden essence of the purest poison — we honor this legacy through the mysteries of Love and Loyalty. ☥
You are never more dangerous, dominating and in control as when being underestimated. Welcome it. Bathe in it. Rise from it. The less someone thinks of you the easier to overpower. ☥

Asetian spirituality is a discipline of the soul and an internal martial art. The path of the warrior, mystic and mage through an alchemy that transforms knowledge into wisdom, focus into awareness and silence into power. A tradition of mastery. ☥
Perpetually united by unspoken bonds that transcend culture, distance and time; unbroken loyalty found deeply within spirit. Never truly lost but ever found. ☥

Soaring through the inscrutable abyss of our violet inferno we devour daemons, consume thought and raise the searing energy with the blessing of everlastingness; essence dripping as poison from flesh into the very core of the soul, tearing the veil between matter and spirit. ☥

New Moon — Approaching Asetian fire with honor and a genuine heart may lead to vast caves of forgotten wisdom but seeking such elusive flames with dishonesty, an unbalanced ego or merely out of curiosity can burn your wings down into a fall that is more lasting than death. ☥

Full Moon — The sheep follow ignorance and popularity, as a blind herd guided by vanity and the illusion of power. Only the strong pursue silent wisdom, with an awareness that breaks all chains and unlocks true mastery, paying no attention to the herd or their lost shepherds. ☥

A higher spell cast by the alchemy emerging from the macrocosm elegantly aligned with the abyssal waters of darkness found only within the gates of your own microcosm; elusive magick that pulsates inside you — raw, untamed and primordial, the truest expression of inner power. ☥

We are a storm; breaking thunder detached as nature, flowing through the wilderness in ethereal observation. Mortals can only see the fallen leaves soaring around our winds, the clouds gently moving, sometimes not even noticing the movement at all. ☥
A child who has only played with mere artifices of modern fireworks will always be blind upon the real flame of an ancient fire. ☥

New Moon — There is great beauty, color and life in that which cannot be seen. Transcend beyond the limitations of a mundane eye and the senses constricted by a materialistic society chained in its own insignificance. ☥

With each challenge one becomes strong. 
With each fall one becomes wise.
With each lesson one becomes humble. 
We do not break to society. 
We do not bow to ego. 
We do not surrender to ignorance.
We teach. We learn. We rise. ☥
Our immortal journey is a path of hardship, struggle and mastery, entwined in suffering and carved in a painting of searing scars that sings tales of torment but also indescribable beauty. ☥
The silent whispers of the wise bear a secret message that loud voices can hardly grasp let alone understand. ☥
Stare into the concealed eye of the storm so that in such a moment you become the storm. A revelation by fire upon the altar of courage. ☥

Let not the faltering of the lost veil your vision or hinder your resolve as torchbearers of the Ancients. Walk the path lit in shadows, your footsteps a song to the Nameless Ones, giants beyond culture, epoch and land. They remain your compass before the clamor of the world. ☥

Approach in humility and their breath becomes logos: a word of frozen jade and flaming yew, the numinous force that forges through silence rather than consumes. In falsehood there is no word, only fire — the merciless honesty that burns away all that should never have been. ᛉ

A Dragon speaks only in the presence of truth, by the naked recognition of one's own insignificance. Stand unclothed of name, title and illusion for Dragons do not parley with appearances.

When ego kneels, they listen.
When masks fall, they look.
Through raw devotion, they stir.

To wield the sword is to cradle a curse veiled in duty, not chosen but whispered by fate. In a world that forgot the covenant of honor, the warrior becomes a ghost clad in defiance. The craven seek mercy they have not sown, with our silence the blade’s edge in every nightmare. ☥

Those who fail to grasp the sanctity of selfless unity are undone not by others but slowly devoured by shadows of their own making; a quiet corruption that blossoms within. Self-inflicted pain rooted in absence and sorrow, nourished by illusions of comfort's deceitful hand. ☥

When one encounters draconian entities within diverse mythologies, it is vital to recognize how they may be intertwined with, or emanations from, this Primordial Tradition itself, refracting its ineffable essence through symbols and tongues of different ages and civilizations. ☥

The Primordial Dragon is not a mere framework, nor confined to a limited scope or a few deities within this gargantuan continuum: it is the very quintessence of the draconian seed, the axis from which dragon power emanates and the roots that nourish the tree of serpentine gnosis.

When treading on the endless path of Dragons and the mysteries of draconian magic, it must be remembered that the Primordial Dragon Tradition and its numinous Triad encompasses all dragon deities and powers, both cosmic and abyssal, as they manifest across cultures and timelines.

Our gnosis is mightiest weapon, puissant salve and feared liberation, cutting through illusion, shielding the just and soothing the soul unshackled. It is key for the rare souls who dare to break the golden cage, a silent current alive and in motion, unseen yet reshaping all. ☥

The oneiric chant of primordial light is but a fine shadow of the endarkened soul, once baptized by the ancestral veils of otherness and clothed in the atramentous fabric of the unmanifest horizon bridging cosmos and abyss — stellar fire and chthonic ice as our tenebrous path. ☥

Many traditions drink from the faded echoes of the Primordial Dragon, yet only a rare few can traverse the arcane pathways that lead into the realms of otherness and their sentient powers, and rarer still are those that can awaken authentic spiritual and sorcerous communion. ᛉ

In an uncultured world where illusory shadows cavort upon the walls of mortal unknowing, even meager vermin aspire to walk as dragons. Their essence but a fleeting spark of corrupted light, lost and unheeded before the serene detachment of beings they vainly strive to emulate. ☥

Ages may pass, yet a soul must return Home — bearing shattered echoes of countless falls, each shard an unfolded map, tears that carve the way upon spirit and flesh, a silent sorrow born of a thousand battles, scars as a talisman and compass of symbols only your eyes can read. ☥

There will always be turbulent waters and devastating storms in the meadows of life, yet the learned initiate cultivates acceptance and stillness, yielding in flowing surrender, so that the maelstrom may pass through them. The warrior does not fear the storm — they become it. ☥

The sacred mysteries of Asetianism form the essential foundation for surviving the alchemical crossing into the realms of the Primordial Dragon—the whetstone that sharpens the Sword of the Soul, allowing it to bathe in abyssal fire without bursting into the flames of oblivion. ☥

In a decaying world of selfishness and deceit, a mundane reality of idolized liars, proud oppressors and tainted prophets, to endure and rise through authenticity, compassion, loyalty and honor becomes a daring mark of feared rebellion — a sinister song of revolution. ☥

Heiðr speaks through the gentle dance of a flame, by the howling winds of an untamed storm, in the silence of a wild thriving forest, beneath the blackness of the hidden moon, within the deadliness of the most vicious of poisons… a forbidden language only the devout can hear. ᛉ

So many eras have come and gone, unfathomable tribulations clashed and done, yet the Family remains ever stronger, under the guiding roar of ancient Dragons and their blackened wings of cosmic silk. Remain strong, bold and genuine beneath the falling leaves of rot and falsity. ☥

The storm is sweet embrace to those who dance in the rain, a sacrament of wilderness and liberation for those born to our sacred ancestral path. In fearless surrender, they are unmade and reborn, becoming kin to its tempest, lovers to its fury, and heirs to its grace. ☥

Let not the faltering of the lost veil your vision or hinder your resolve as torchbearers of the Ancients. Walk the path lit in shadows, your footsteps a song to the Nameless Ones, giants beyond culture, epoch and land. They remain your compass before the clamor of the world. ☥

Approach in humility and their breath becomes logos: a word of frozen jade and flaming yew, the numinous force that forges through silence rather than consumes. In falsehood there is no word, only fire — the merciless honesty that burns away all that should never have been. ᛉ

A Dragon speaks only in the presence of truth, by the naked recognition of one's own insignificance. Stand unclothed of name, title and illusion for Dragons do not parley with appearances.

When ego kneels, they listen.
When masks fall, they look.
Through raw devotion, they stir.

To wield the sword is to cradle a curse veiled in duty, not chosen but whispered by fate. In a world that forgot the covenant of honor, the warrior becomes a ghost clad in defiance. The craven seek mercy they have not sown, with our silence the blade’s edge in every nightmare. ☥

Those who fail to grasp the sanctity of selfless unity are undone not by others but slowly devoured by shadows of their own making; a quiet corruption that blossoms within. Self-inflicted pain rooted in absence and sorrow, nourished by illusions of comfort's deceitful hand. ☥

When one encounters draconian entities within diverse mythologies, it is vital to recognize how they may be intertwined with, or emanations from, this Primordial Tradition itself, refracting its ineffable essence through symbols and tongues of different ages and civilizations. ☥

The Primordial Dragon is not a mere framework, nor confined to a limited scope or a few deities within this gargantuan continuum: it is the very quintessence of the draconian seed, the axis from which dragon power emanates and the roots that nourish the tree of serpentine gnosis.

When treading on the endless path of Dragons and the mysteries of draconian magic, it must be remembered that the Primordial Dragon Tradition and its numinous Triad encompasses all dragon deities and powers, both cosmic and abyssal, as they manifest across cultures and timelines.

Our gnosis is mightiest weapon, puissant salve and feared liberation, cutting through illusion, shielding the just and soothing the soul unshackled. It is key for the rare souls who dare to break the golden cage, a silent current alive and in motion, unseen yet reshaping all. ☥

The oneiric chant of primordial light is but a fine shadow of the endarkened soul, once baptized by the ancestral veils of otherness and clothed in the atramentous fabric of the unmanifest horizon bridging cosmos and abyss — stellar fire and chthonic ice as our tenebrous path. ☥

Many traditions drink from the faded echoes of the Primordial Dragon, yet only a rare few can traverse the arcane pathways that lead into the realms of otherness and their sentient powers, and rarer still are those that can awaken authentic spiritual and sorcerous communion. ᛉ

In an uncultured world where illusory shadows cavort upon the walls of mortal unknowing, even meager vermin aspire to walk as dragons. Their essence but a fleeting spark of corrupted light, lost and unheeded before the serene detachment of beings they vainly strive to emulate. ☥

Ages may pass, yet a soul must return Home — bearing shattered echoes of countless falls, each shard an unfolded map, tears that carve the way upon spirit and flesh, a silent sorrow born of a thousand battles, scars as a talisman and compass of symbols only your eyes can read. ☥

The storm is sweet embrace to those who dance in the rain, a sacrament of wilderness and liberation for those born to our sacred ancestral path. In fearless surrender, they are unmade and reborn, becoming kin to its tempest, lovers to its fury, and heirs to its grace. ☥

Let not the faltering of the lost veil your vision or hinder your resolve as torchbearers of the Ancients. Walk the path lit in shadows, your footsteps a song to the Nameless Ones, giants beyond culture, epoch and land. They remain your compass before the clamor of the world. ☥

Approach in humility and their breath becomes logos: a word of frozen jade and flaming yew, the numinous force that forges through silence rather than consumes. In falsehood there is no word, only fire — the merciless honesty that burns away all that should never have been. ᛉ

A Dragon speaks only in the presence of truth, by the naked recognition of one's own insignificance. Stand unclothed of name, title and illusion for Dragons do not parley with appearances.

When ego kneels, they listen.
When masks fall, they look.
Through raw devotion, they stir.

To wield the sword is to cradle a curse veiled in duty, not chosen but whispered by fate. In a world that forgot the covenant of honor, the warrior becomes a ghost clad in defiance. The craven seek mercy they have not sown, with our silence the blade’s edge in every nightmare. ☥

Those who fail to grasp the sanctity of selfless unity are undone not by others but slowly devoured by shadows of their own making; a quiet corruption that blossoms within. Self-inflicted pain rooted in absence and sorrow, nourished by illusions of comfort's deceitful hand. ☥

When one encounters draconian entities within diverse mythologies, it is vital to recognize how they may be intertwined with, or emanations from, this Primordial Tradition itself, refracting its ineffable essence through symbols and tongues of different ages and civilizations. ☥

The Primordial Dragon is not a mere framework, nor confined to a limited scope or a few deities within this gargantuan continuum: it is the very quintessence of the draconian seed, the axis from which dragon power emanates and the roots that nourish the tree of serpentine gnosis.

When treading on the endless path of Dragons and the mysteries of draconian magic, it must be remembered that the Primordial Dragon Tradition and its numinous Triad encompasses all dragon deities and powers, both cosmic and abyssal, as they manifest across cultures and timelines.

Our gnosis is mightiest weapon, puissant salve and feared liberation, cutting through illusion, shielding the just and soothing the soul unshackled. It is key for the rare souls who dare to break the golden cage, a silent current alive and in motion, unseen yet reshaping all. ☥

The oneiric chant of primordial light is but a fine shadow of the endarkened soul, once baptized by the ancestral veils of otherness and clothed in the atramentous fabric of the unmanifest horizon bridging cosmos and abyss — stellar fire and chthonic ice as our tenebrous path. ☥

Many traditions drink from the faded echoes of the Primordial Dragon, yet only a rare few can traverse the arcane pathways that lead into the realms of otherness and their sentient powers, and rarer still are those that can awaken authentic spiritual and sorcerous communion. ᛉ

In an uncultured world where illusory shadows cavort upon the walls of mortal unknowing, even meager vermin aspire to walk as dragons. Their essence but a fleeting spark of corrupted light, lost and unheeded before the serene detachment of beings they vainly strive to emulate. ☥

Ages may pass, yet a soul must return Home — bearing shattered echoes of countless falls, each shard an unfolded map, tears that carve the way upon spirit and flesh, a silent sorrow born of a thousand battles, scars as a talisman and compass of symbols only your eyes can read. ☥

There will always be turbulent waters and devastating storms in the meadows of life, yet the learned initiate cultivates acceptance and stillness, yielding in flowing surrender, so that the maelstrom may pass through them. The warrior does not fear the storm — they become it. ☥

We walk among giants, treading the gnarled roots of the most ancient trees, our voices woven into the songs of the wind, our footsteps stirring the tremors of the earth. Our hands rise to the drums of time, as colossal mountains bearing the smoldering hearts of rock and flame. ☥

The sacred mysteries of Asetianism form the essential foundation for surviving the alchemical crossing into the realms of the Primordial Dragon—the whetstone that sharpens the Sword of the Soul, allowing it to bathe in abyssal fire without bursting into the flames of oblivion. ☥

In a decaying world of selfishness and deceit, a mundane reality of idolized liars, proud oppressors and tainted prophets, to endure and rise through authenticity, compassion, loyalty and honor becomes a daring mark of feared rebellion — a sinister song of revolution. ☥
